design_philosophy: Authoritative, Dense, precise, high-legibility. Reminiscent of Morgan Stanley or Palantir Foundry.

layout_and_spacing.grid: Control Room Grid (Dense, gap-4). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6
layout_and_spacing.cards: Sharp edges (2px radius). No heavy shadows. Use 1px borders for structure.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous on containers (p-6), dense inside data tables (py-1).

image_urls.description: Abstract empty state for drag-and-drop file upload zone. Use as a background or center image in the upload area.
High-end corporate finance background for login or landing hero page.
Professional user profile avatar to be used in the top navigation or sidebar profile block.

components_and_features.file_upload_zone: Massive central dropzone. Use dashed borders, muted background. Include the 'empty_state_upload' image in the center.
components_and_features.kpi_cards: Bento layout. Value text uses IBM Plex Sans in bold, text-4xl. Add a subtle 1px border. No drop shadows.
components_and_features.charts: Use Recharts. Time series (line), Histograms (bar), Scatter (scatter), Heatmap (custom grid or recharts scatter).
components_and_features.ai_insights_panel: Right sidebar. Glassmorphism effect `bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl`. Use 'accent' (emerald) text for positive insights.
components_and_features.filter_panel: Sticky left sidebar or collapsible top accordion.
components_and_features.data_preview_table: Shadcn Table. Extremely dense. `text-xs`. Striped rows for high legibility.
components_and_features.drag_drop_dashboard: Use CSS Grid with explicit columns and rows. Add drag handles on the top right of each card.
components_and_features.report_generator: A dedicated modal using Shadcn Dialog with a clean summary format.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Replace variables in `src/index.css` with the colors provided in this JSON. It must precisely override the light/dark values.
3. Set Tailwind base classes in `index.css` to use `IBM Plex Sans` globally. Override headings (h1, h2, h3) with `font-serif` linked to `Cormorant Garamond` via `tailwind.config.js`.
4. MANDATORY: Add `data-testid` to all buttons, form inputs, navigation links, KPI cards, tables, and interactive elements. Follow format `data-testid="role-action"`.
7. PROHIBITED: Do not use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Lato.
8. PROHIBITED: Do not use teal or purple gradients anywhere.
9. Use `recharts` for all complex data visualization components.
